visual_description: A young man with dark hair and round glasses, wearing a dark corduroy jacket, is shown in a dimly lit, dark environment. He turns his head slowly to his right, his expression shifting from neutral to one of surprise or concern as he looks at someone or something off-screen. The background is dark and indistinct, suggesting a cave or a similar enclosed space.
audio_description: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score plays in the background, creating a tense atmosphere.
